name: Apple Pineapple Relish
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Granny Smith apples, cut into 1/4-inch dice
1 cup pineapple, peeled, cored, and cut into 1/4-inch dice
Pineapple slices - 1/4-inch thick, pared and cored as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except pineapple slices in a ceramic dish.
2. Cover and refrigerate. Marinate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
3. Place pineapple slices on wire racks in a convection oven.
4. Bake at 250 degrees until the slices are golden, about 2 hours.
5. The slices should become crisp when cool.
